channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/24)
channel.description: 今天的信息流里，AI Agent 和 AI Coding 几乎占满了。从像 Shopify 这样的大公司如何落地 Claude Code，到社区里冒出来的各种优化工具和讨论帖，再到能跑在小型模型上的 Coding Agent，感觉 AI 编程已经从“能不能用”进入了“怎么用好、怎么规模化”的阶段。另外，有几个关于 Agent 工作流和记忆管理的项目也很有意思，值得深入看看。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天的信息流里，AI Agent 和 AI Coding 几乎占满了。从像 Shopify 这样的大公司如何落地 Claude Code，到社区里冒出来的各种优化工具和讨论帖，再到能跑在小型模型上的 Coding Agent，感觉 AI 编程已经从“能不能用”进入了“怎么用好、怎么规模化”的阶段。另外，有几个关于 Agent 工作流和记忆管理的项目也很有意思，值得深入看看。

item.title: perplexityai/bumblebee
item.description: Read-only developer endpoint scanner for on-disk package, extension, and developer-tool metadata, built to check exposure to known software supply-chain compromises. | 近期热门 | 总 1368 stars
item.author: perplexityai

item.title: Doorman11991/smallcode
item.description: AI coding agent optimized for small LLMs. 87% benchmark with 4B-active model. | 近期热门 | 总 1326 stars
item.author: Doorman11991

item.title: lynote-ai/humanize-text
item.description: Free open-source AI text humanizer to convert AI-generated content into undetectable, human-like writing. Bypass Turnitin, GPTZero, and all major AI detectors. No sign-up required. Try our unlimited free online tool | 近期热门 | 总 566 stars
item.author: lynote-ai

item.title: xw7872081123/wallpaper-engine-steam
item.description: Free Wallpaper Engine Steam: download PC windows 11, steam workshop downloader bypass, high CPU RAM usage fix, android apk mobile sync. 4k anime live wallpaper, black screen crash on startup, corsair icue razer chroma integration, ui32.exe error solution, scene web wallpaper, mobile connection pin, custom playlist screensaver, | 近期热门 | 总 455 stars
item.author: xw7872081123

item.title: basketikun/infinite-canvas
item.description: 面向AI创作的开源无限画布工作台，集成 AI 生图、参考图编辑、画布编排、对话助手、提示词库和素材管理等功能。 | 近期热门 | 总 454 stars
item.author: basketikun

item.title: evilsocket/audit
item.description: An 8-stage vulnerability-discovery agent. | 近期热门 | 总 448 stars

item.description: Claude pro free Mythos design Opus Cowork Sonnet AI Anthropic App: download free PC android apk iOS, Anthropic Claude API key setup, Claude roleplay mythos client, SillyTavern Claude prompt formatting, custom system prompt jailbreak, Mythos AI creative writing app, Claude 3.5 Sonnet Opus API cost, open source LLM frontend, Claude reverse proxy | 近期热门 | 总 435 stars
item.author: AbhishekK130804

item.title: haiddrrs/Steam-Tools
item.description: Lua Steam Tools: SteamTools download free PC latest version, lua manifest generator github, steamtools safe to use account ban risk, BeyondDimension SteamTools source code, unlock free steam games dlc unlocker, watt toolkit alternative, steamtools exe local ticket bypass, lua tools manifest downloader, st-setup virus total malware scan, steamtools | 近期热门 | 总 417 stars

item.title: SalhaNabil/CloakBrowser
